text.tspan: DATA APOCALYPSE AVERTED
@unhappychoice fixes daily-fetch bug that was silently losing Sunday's events. Crisis averted.
COVERAGE NIRVANA ACHIEVED
@unhappychoice skyrockets test coverage from 40% to 97% in one week. Quality team stunned.
DEPENDABOT DEPLOYED
@unhappychoice unleashes Dependabot to automatically update 15 dependencies. Humans optional.
COMMIT STORM
@unhappychoice unleashes 283 commits in a single day. Keyboard smoke reported.
MULTI-REPO MAYHEM
@unhappychoice merges PRs across 8 repositories simultaneously. Octopus mode activated.
BUG EXTERMINATION
@unhappychoice squashes timezone bugs and private repo leaks. No code is safe.
QUALITY ASSURANCE
@unhappychoice adds 147 new tests. CI pipeline weeps with joy.
DATA APOCALYPSE AVERTED
